# Howard Kessler,DC

A chiropractic practice based at 230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, serving a broad and diverse patient base throughout Bergen County. The practice welcomes everyone from young patients (age 10) to seniors (age 100), including weekend athletes and working professionals. The brand has a community-centered, inclusive feel — approachable yet professional, focused on helping people of all ages and lifestyles feel their best.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Move Better, Live Fully — Howard Kessler, DC

URL: https://example.com
Description: Your trusted chiropractor in Bergen County NJ, serving ages 10 to 100 with personalized care. Find lasting back pain relief and renewed vitality. Book your visit today.

Move Better, Live Fully — Howard Kessler, DC

# Your Trusted Chiropractor in Hillsdale, Serving All of Bergen County



###   Our mission at the office of Howard Kessler DC is simply to serve you. We provide excellent chiropractic care to help our patients reach and exceed their health goals. We assess the patient as a whole. We want to address the main concern, but also lead you into a lifestyle of being pain free. We do all of this by offering an evidence-based approach to chiropractic care by utilizing chiropractic manipulation, soft-tissue techniques, therapeutic rehabilitation, and a variety of chiropractic services to help achieve your health goals.


Book Your Visit
Explore Our Services















## Comprehensive Care for Every Stage of Life


From a 10-year-old's first sports injury to a 100-year-old's desire to stay active, our approach is rooted in personalized, practical treatment plans. We listen first, then guide you toward lasting relief and mobility — without the clinical jargon.












### Pain Relief & Spinal Alignment


Targeted adjustments and decompression techniques designed to address herniated discs, chronic back pain, and postural strain. We focus on restoring your body's natural balance so you can move through your day with ease.

Learn more about pain relief  →










### Mobility Support for Active Lifestyles


Whether you're a weekend warrior or a working professional, we help you recover from sports injuries and repetitive stress. Our sports injury chiropractic treatment in Bergen County keeps you performing at your best.

Explore mobility solutions  →










### Ongoing Wellness for All Ages


Chiropractic isn't just for pain — it's for life. From growing teens to vibrant seniors, our maintenance and wellness plans support long-term spinal health, flexibility, and a better quality of life at every age.

Discover wellness care  →
















Who We Help


## Care That Moves With You


From weekend warriors to seasoned pros, growing kids to active grandparents — our practice understands real everyday strain, changing bodies, and the different goals that come with every stage of life.











### Weekend Athletes


You push hard on the trails, courts, and roads — and sometimes your body pushes back. We help you recover faster, move better, and stay in the game you love.











### Working Professionals


Long hours at a desk or on your feet take a toll. We address the tension, headaches, and back pain that come from the daily grind — so you can focus on what matters.











### Active Seniors


Staying mobile and independent is everything. We use gentle, effective techniques to support aging joints, improve balance, and keep you doing the things that bring you joy.











### Growing Kids & Youth Athletes


Growing bodies need support too. From sports injuries to posture habits, we help young people build a strong, healthy foundation — starting as early as age 10.




















## What Our Patients Are Saying


From weekend athletes and working professionals to seniors staying active, our practice is proud to serve patients across Bergen County. Here are a few voices from the community we’re honored to support.












### Finally, Relief That Lasts


“Working long hours at a desk had my back in constant knots. Dr. Kessler not only adjusted what was out of place but gave me simple stretches I actually do. I haven’t felt this mobile in years.”


— Michael T.
Software Developer, Hillsdale








### Back on the Trail


“A cycling crash left my hip so tight I thought my riding days were over. The targeted care and encouragement I received got me back on my bike stronger and smarter about my body.”


— Sarah L.
Weekend Cyclist, Ridgewood








### Playing with the Grandkids Again


“At 78, I figured some stiffness was just part of getting older. After a few gentle sessions, I’m back in the garden and keeping up with my grandchildren. The whole team makes you feel like family.”


— Eleanor R.
Retired Teacher, Westwood



















## Ready to Feel Your Best?


Whether you're a weekend athlete, a busy professional, or simply looking to move with more ease, our doors are open. We provide personalized chiropractic care for all ages — from 10 to 100 — right here in Bergen County.


230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, 07642, US

## Heal, Strengthen, Thrive — Howard Kessler, DC

URL: https://example.com/services
Description: Expert chiropractic services in Bergen County, from spinal decompression for herniated discs to sports injury treatment. Tailored care that gets you back to your best self.

Heal, Strengthen, Thrive — Howard Kessler, DC

# Individualized Chiropractic Care for Every Stage of Life


At Howard Kessler, DC, we believe that effective chiropractic treatment is never one-size-fits-all. Serving patients across Bergen County from our Hillsdale practice, we take the time to understand your unique body, lifestyle, and goals — whether you're a weekend athlete recovering from a sports injury, a working professional managing daily tension, or a senior seeking to maintain mobility and comfort. Our approach blends gentle, evidence-informed techniques with clear, practical guidance so you can move better, feel stronger, and return to the activities that matter most.



Personalized treatment plans tailored to your specific needs, not a generic protocol.


Gentle, effective techniques suitable for patients from age 10 to 100.


Practical, non-technical explanations so you always understand your care.





















Our Services

## Care That Moves With You


From children taking their first dive into sports to grandparents enjoying their golden years, our approach is built around your unique story. We blend gentle, evidence-informed techniques with a listening ear, so you leave feeling understood, restored, and ready for what’s next.









### Spinal Alignment & Support


Rediscover balance through precise, low-force adjustments designed to restore your spine’s natural rhythm. Whether you’re managing everyday tension or recovering from an old injury, this foundational care helps your nervous system communicate clearly, easing discomfort and improving overall vitality.







### Neck & Back Discomfort Care


When persistent aches in your neck or back keep you from the activities you love, targeted relief makes all the difference. We focus on calming irritated joints and soft tissues, helping you find lasting comfort without relying on medication or invasive procedures.







### Posture & Mobility Guidance


Modern life pulls us forward — screens, desks, and long commutes take a toll. We’ll work together to retrain your posture and unlock restricted movement patterns, empowering you to stand taller, move freer, and prevent future strain.







### Wellness Maintenance Visits


Feeling good shouldn’t be a temporary state. Regular wellness check-ins help you stay ahead of tension, maintain the progress you’ve made, and keep your body performing at its peak — whether you’re a weekend warrior, a busy professional, or simply want to age gracefully.

















## Feel Better, Move Freely, Live Fully


At Howard Kessler, DC, we believe chiropractic care isn't just about treating pain — it's about restoring your ability to enjoy the moments that matter. Whether you're a weekend athlete pushing your limits, a working professional managing desk strain, or a senior staying active through the years, our approach is designed around your real life.










### Move More Freely, Every Day


Stiffness and limited range of motion shouldn't hold you back. Through gentle, targeted adjustments, we help restore your body's natural mobility so you can bend, reach, walk, and play without hesitation. From getting out of bed in the morning to chasing after grandkids, freedom of movement changes everything.











### Recover from Everyday Strain


Long hours at a desk, lifting groceries, weekend sports, or simply the accumulated stress of daily life can take a toll on your body. Our chiropractic treatments address the root causes of discomfort — not just the symptoms — helping you bounce back faster and stay resilient against the wear and tear of modern living.











### Maintain Comfort Through the Years


Aging doesn't have to mean accepting chronic pain. From young patients building healthy foundations to seniors preserving their independence, our practice supports every stage of life. We work with you to maintain spinal health, improve posture, and keep you doing what you love — for as long as you want to do it.






















## Your Path to Relief & Recovery










01

### Initial Conversation


We start by listening to your story — your daily routine, discomforts, and goals. Whether you're a weekend athlete, a working professional, or someone simply wanting to move more freely, this conversation helps us understand you beyond the symptoms.










02

### Personalized Assessment


Dr. Kessler performs a thorough, gentle evaluation to identify the root cause of your pain. Using a blend of modern diagnostic insight and hands-on care, we create a clear picture of your spinal health and how it connects to your overall well-being.










03

### Thoughtful Care Plan


Together, we design a care plan tailored exactly to your needs. From gentle adjustments to targeted therapies for back pain relief or herniated discs, every recommendation is made with your comfort, lifestyle, and long-term health in mind.










04

### Ongoing Progress Support


Healing is a journey, and we're with you every step of the way. Through regular check-ins, supportive adjustments, and practical advice, we help you stay active and pain-free — whether you're 10 or 100 years old.






















## Common Questions About Our Practice


We know that visiting a chiropractor for the first time can bring up questions. Here are some of the most common things patients ask us when they walk through our doors at 230 Broadway. If you don't see your question here, just give us a call — we're happy to chat.








### Who does Dr. Kessler treat?


We welcome patients from all walks of life across Bergen County. Our practice sees everyone from young patients starting around age 10 to seniors well into their 90s and beyond. Whether you're a weekend athlete, a working professional sitting at a desk all week, or someone simply wanting to move more comfortably, you'll find a place here.






### What kinds of concerns bring patients in?


People visit us with a wide range of issues. Common reasons include back pain relief, neck stiffness, herniated discs, headaches, and joint discomfort. Many also come for spinal decompression, recovery after a car accident, or simply to maintain overall wellness and prevent future problems.






### Is chiropractic care suitable for athletes?


Absolutely. We regularly work with athletes — from weekend warriors to dedicated runners and cyclists. Sports injury chiropractic treatment helps with recovery, improves range of motion, and can even enhance performance. Our approach is tailored to your specific activity level and goals.






### Is care gentle enough for seniors?


Yes. We adjust our techniques to match each person's comfort and health status. Many of our senior patients find that regular chiropractic care helps them stay active, reduces stiffness, and improves their quality of life. We take extra care to ensure every adjustment feels safe and appropriate.






### How do I get in touch or schedule a visit?


The easiest way is to call our office directly. We're located at 230 Broadway in Hillsdale, NJ, and we're always happy to answer your questions, discuss your concerns, and find a time that works for you. You can also reach out through our contact page — we typically respond within one business day.






### What should I expect during my first visit?


Your first appointment is all about understanding you. We'll talk through your health history, discuss what's bringing you in, and perform a gentle examination. If appropriate, we may provide a first adjustment. Our goal is to make sure you leave feeling informed, comfortable, and confident in your care plan.














Gentle, personalized chiropractic care for your family's wellness journey. We listen, we care, we heal.

Generations of Care, One Trusted Name — Howard Kessler, DC

# Meet Howard Kessler, DC


A trusted chiropractor in Bergen County, NJ, dedicated to helping patients of all ages and walks of life move, feel, and live better.















## A practice built on trust and connection


With years of hands-on experience serving the Bergen County community, Howard Kessler, DC brings a philosophy of care that goes beyond simple adjustments. He believes that effective chiropractic treatment starts with truly listening to each patient's story — understanding their daily routines, physical demands, and personal health goals.


Whether you're a weekend athlete recovering from a sports injury, a working professional dealing with back pain, or a senior looking to maintain mobility and independence, Dr. Kessler tailors every treatment plan to your unique needs. His approach integrates gentle, evidence-based techniques with a genuine respect for the body's natural ability to heal.


From herniated discs to spinal decompression and everyday aches, his goal is to help you find lasting relief — not just a quick fix. He is proud to serve patients from age 10 to 100, creating a welcoming environment where everyone feels heard, respected, and empowered on their journey to wellness.


Proudly serving Hillsdale and all of Bergen County, NJ.















## Our Practice Philosophy



Guided by three simple principles that put your well-being at the center of everything we do.











### Care That Feels Personal


Every patient who walks through our door is treated like family. We take the time to listen, understand your unique story, and craft a care plan that addresses your specific needs — never a one-size-fits-all approach.










### Guidance That Fits Real Life


Healing doesn't stop when you leave our office. We provide practical, realistic guidance that integrates seamlessly into your daily routine — whether you're a weekend warrior, a busy professional, or enjoying your golden years.










### An Inclusive Environment for All


From age 10 to 100, our practice proudly serves the entire Bergen County community. We celebrate diversity in age, background, and lifestyle, creating a welcoming space where everyone feels comfortable and respected.















Our Community

## Rooted in Bergen County,Built Around You






















From weekend athletes chasing their next personal best to working professionals managing the demands of daily life, and from active seniors staying mobile to young students building healthy habits — Howard Kessler, DC has been a trusted part of the Bergen County community for years. We believe chiropractic care isn't just about treating pain; it's about helping people of all ages and walks of life feel their best so they can show up fully for the moments that matter most. Our practice at 230 Broadway in Hillsdale is woven into the rhythm of everyday life — where neighbors become patients, and patients become friends.















## What Our Community Says


Real experiences from patients across Bergen County — from weekend athletes to working professionals, ages 10 to 100.




“

### Finally found lasting relief


After years of lower back pain and trying everything, Dr. Kessler took the time to really understand my lifestyle. The spinal decompression treatment has been a game-changer for my herniated discs.

— Michael R., Ridgewood


“

### Keeps me on the field


As a weekend soccer player, I was sidelined with a stubborn sports injury. Howard Kessler chiropractor got me back in the game faster than I thought possible. Truly attentive care.

— Sarah T., Hillsdale


“

### Whole family feels welcome


We started bringing our teenage son for posture issues, and now my 85-year-old mother sees Dr. Kessler too. The practice is warm, professional, and treats every age with genuine respect.

— The Park Family, Westwood


“

### No more desk-job stiffness


Working long hours at a computer left me with constant neck and shoulder tension. The adjustments are precise and gentle — I walk out feeling taller and lighter every single visit.

— David L., Paramus












## Ready to Feel Your Best?


At Howard Kessler, DC, we believe chiropractic care is for everyone — from weekend athletes to working professionals, and all walks of life across Bergen County. Whether you're 10 or 100, our practice combines clinical expertise with a genuinely personal touch. Let's start your journey to better health together.

Schedule Your Visit

230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, 07642, US















Gentle, personalized chiropractic care for your family's wellness journey. We listen, we care, we heal.

## Find Us in the Heart of Bergen County



















### Howard Kessler, DC


230 Broadway

Hillsdale, NJ 07642



230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, 07642, US



View on Map








Conveniently located on Broadway in Hillsdale, our practice is easily accessible from across Bergen County. Whether you're visiting from Westwood, River Vale, or surrounding communities, you'll find a warm, welcoming space where patients of all ages—from 10 to 100—feel right at home. Plenty of parking and a ground-floor entrance make every visit smooth and stress-free.














## Ready When You Are


We've designed our practice to fit seamlessly into your life — whether you're stopping by after a weekend game, swinging through on your lunch break, or bringing the whole family in for care.








### First Visit? Come On In


New patients are always welcome — no referral needed. We take time to listen, explain everything in plain language, and make sure you feel comfortable from the moment you walk through the door. Whether you're 10 or 100, you'll be treated like family.







### Flexible Hours for Real Life


From early morning appointments before work to later slots that fit school pickups and weekend training schedules, we structure our availability around the rhythms of Bergen County families and working professionals. Your time matters.







### Questions Before You Book?


Not sure if chiropractic care is right for your herniated disc or nagging sports injury? We encourage you to reach out with any questions. Dr. Kessler is happy to chat before you commit — no pressure, just honest guidance.












## Your Path to Comfort Starts Here


Whether you're a weekend athlete, a working professional, or simply looking to move better every day, Howard Kessler, DC is here to help. We welcome patients from 10 to 100 across Bergen County and beyond — start the conversation today and discover care that supports your everyday life.



Return Home


Explore Services



Proudly serving Hillsdale, NJ and the greater Bergen County community.
















Gentle, personalized chiropractic care for your family's wellness journey. We listen, we care, we heal.

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/8/2026



Howard Kessler,DC ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Howard Kessler,DC

- Email: howardkesslerdc@optonline.net

- Phone: 201-664-4864

- Address: 230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, 07642, US



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Services
- About



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 8, 2026



Howard Kessler,DC is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Howard Kessler,DC

- Email: howardkesslerdc@optonline.net

- Phone: 201-664-4864



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















Gentle, personalized chiropractic care for your family's wellness journey. We listen, we care, we heal.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 8, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Howard Kessler,DC

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Healthcare / Chiropractic provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Howard Kessler,DC provides Healthcare / Chiropractic through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Howard Kessler,DC. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Howard Kessler,DC

- Email: howardkesslerdc@optonline.net

- Phone: 201-664-4864

- Address: 230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, 07642, US
